app.name: No Crop
app.tagline: Resize images to any ratio — without cropping.

privacy.title: Your photos stay on your device
privacy.body: All decoding, blurring, color extraction, and exporting happens locally in your browser. No image data is ever uploaded to a server.

dropzone.title: Drop an image here
dropzone.hint: or click to choose · paste with ⌘V

solid.reseed_button: Use this color as app theme

export.jpeg_hint: JPEG is lossy. Use quality ≥ 90 for blurred backgrounds; PNG is recommended for solid colors.

error.image_too_large: This image is too large for your device. Please use a smaller one.
error.heic_decode_failed: Couldn't decode this HEIC file. Try JPEG or PNG.
error.canvas_unavailable: Canvas is not available in this browser.
error.unsupported_format: Unsupported file format. Supported: JPEG, PNG, WebP, HEIC.
error.clipboard_empty: No image found on the clipboard.
error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
